title: Kingfisher Decorative Wire Border Fencing
description: Product Description Manufactured from the house of Kingfisher, operates over 1,100 stores and growing omni channel operations across 10 countries in Europe. Following an in-depth review of Kingfisher’s businesses alongside in-depth studies of our customers’ home improvement needs, the leadership team announced the 'one' Kingfisher plan. This plan will leverage the scale of the business by creating a unified company, where customer needs always come first. Box Contains 1 x Decorative Wire Border Fencing
